<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Tests\Unit\Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Client;

use Eliberty\ConfigManagerBundle\Model\ConfigManager;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Client\ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\ApiClientInterface;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Response\ApiResponseInterface;
use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\MockObject;
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;

class ElibertyBookingV2ApiClientTest extends TestCase
{
    /**
     * @var ApiClientInterface|MockObject
     */
    private $authClient;

    /**
     * @var ConfigManager|MockObject
     */
    private $configManager;

    /**
     * @var ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient
     */
    private $client;

    protected function setUp(): void
    {
        $this->authClient    = $this->createMock(ApiClientInterface::class);
        $this->configManager = $this->createMock(ConfigManager::class);
        $this->client        = new ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient($this->authClient, $this->configManager);
    }

    public function testItInjectsTenantSlagHeaderOnEveryCall(): void
    {
        $this->configManager
            ->method('getStringOption')
            ->with('booking.v2.tenant-slag')
            ->willReturn('my-tenant');

        $expectedResponse = $this->createMock(ApiResponseInterface::class);

        $this->authClient
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('call')
            ->with(
                'GET',
                '/admin/timeslot/list/uuid-1',
                ['headers' => ['x-tenant-slag' => 'my-tenant']]
            )
            ->willReturn($expectedResponse);

        $result = $this->client->call('GET', '/admin/timeslot/list/uuid-1');

        $this->assertSame($expectedResponse, $result);
    }

    public function testItPreservesCallerSuppliedOptions(): void
    {
        $this->configManager
            ->method('getStringOption')
            ->with('booking.v2.tenant-slag')
            ->willReturn('my-tenant');

        $this->authClient
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('call')
            ->with(
                'POST',
                '/client/booking/uuid-2',
                [
                    'json'    => ['foo' => 'bar'],
                    'headers' => ['x-tenant-slag' => 'my-tenant'],
                ]
            )
            ->willReturn($this->createMock(ApiResponseInterface::class));

        $this->client->call('POST', '/client/booking/uuid-2', ['json' => ['foo' => 'bar']]);
    }

    public function testItPreservesCallerSuppliedHeadersAndAddsTenantSlag(): void
    {
        $this->configManager
            ->method('getStringOption')
            ->with('booking.v2.tenant-slag')
            ->willReturn('my-tenant');

        $this->authClient
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('call')
            ->with(
                'GET',
                '/foo',
                [
                    'headers' => [
                        'accept'        => 'application/json',
                        'x-tenant-slag' => 'my-tenant',
                    ],
                ]
            )
            ->willReturn($this->createMock(ApiResponseInterface::class));

        $this->client->call('GET', '/foo', ['headers' => ['accept' => 'application/json']]);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Client;

use Eliberty\ConfigManagerBundle\Model\ConfigManager;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\ApiClientInterface;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Response\ApiResponseInterface;

/**
 * Decorates an authenticated ApiClient and injects the Eliberty Booking V2
 * `x-tenant-slag` header (read from ConfigManager) on every call.
 */
final class ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient implements ApiClientInterface
{
    public const TENANT_SLAG_CONFIG_KEY = 'booking.v2.tenant-slag';
    public const TENANT_SLAG_HEADER     = 'x-tenant-slag';

    private ApiClientInterface $authClient;

    private ConfigManager $configManager;

    public function __construct(ApiClientInterface $authClient, ConfigManager $configManager)
    {
        $this->authClient    = $authClient;
        $this->configManager = $configManager;
    }

    /**
     * @param array<string, mixed> $options
     */
    public function call(string $method, string $uri = '', array $options = []): ApiResponseInterface
    {
        $tenantSlag                                  = (string) $this->configManager->getStringOption(self::TENANT_SLAG_CONFIG_KEY);
        $options['headers']                          = $options['headers'] ?? [];
        $options['headers'][self::TENANT_SLAG_HEADER] = $tenantSlag;

        return $this->authClient->call($method, $uri, $options);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Client;

use Eliberty\ConfigManagerBundle\Model\ConfigManager;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\ApiClientInterface;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Response\ApiResponseInterface;

/**
 * Decorates an authenticated ApiClient and injects the Eliberty Booking V2
 * `x-tenant-slag` header (read from ConfigManager) on every call.
 */
final class ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient implements ApiClientInterface
{
    public const TENANT_SLAG_CONFIG_KEY = 'booking.v2.tenant-slag';
    public const TENANT_SLAG_HEADER     = 'x-tenant-slag';

    private ApiClientInterface $authClient;

    private ConfigManager $configManager;

    public function __construct(ApiClientInterface $authClient, ConfigManager $configManager)
    {
        $this->authClient    = $authClient;
        $this->configManager = $configManager;
    }

    /**
     * @param array<string, mixed> $options
     */
    public function call(string $method, string $uri = '', array $options = []): ApiResponseInterface
    {
        $tenantSlag                                  = (string) $this->configManager->getStringOption(self::TENANT_SLAG_CONFIG_KEY);
        $options['headers']                          = $options['headers'] ?? [];
        $options['headers'][self::TENANT_SLAG_HEADER] = $tenantSlag;

        return $this->authClient->call($method, $uri, $options);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Tests\Unit\Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Repository;

use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Repository\BookingV2Repository;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\ApiClientInterface;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Response\ApiResponseInterface;
use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\MockObject;
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;

class BookingV2RepositoryTest extends TestCase
{
    /**
     * @var ApiClientInterface|MockObject
     */
    private $apiClient;

    /**
     * @var BookingV2Repository
     */
    private $repository;

    protected function setUp(): void
    {
        $this->apiClient  = $this->createMock(ApiClientInterface::class);
        $this->repository = new BookingV2Repository($this->apiClient);
    }

    public function testListTimeslotsCallsAdminEndpointWithDateRange(): void
    {
        $payload = ['data' => [['uuid' => 'slot-1']]];

        $response = $this->createMock(ApiResponseInterface::class);
        $response->method('getData')->willReturn($payload);

        $this->apiClient
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('call')
            ->with(
                'GET',
                '/admin/timeslot/list/resource-uuid',
                ['query' => ['dateFrom' => '2026-04-01', 'dateTo' => '2026-04-30']]
            )
            ->willReturn($response);

        $this->assertSame(
            $payload,
            $this->repository->listTimeslots('resource-uuid', '2026-04-01', '2026-04-30')
        );
    }

    public function testCreateBookingPostsJsonToTimeslotEndpoint(): void
    {
        $body     = ['isItPreBooking' => true, 'customerUserId' => '42'];
        $expected = ['uuid' => 'booking-1', 'isCanceled' => false];

        $response = $this->createMock(ApiResponseInterface::class);
        $response->method('getData')->willReturn($expected);

        $this->apiClient
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('call')
            ->with(
                'POST',
                '/client/booking/timeslot-uuid',
                ['json' => $body]
            )
            ->willReturn($response);

        $this->assertSame($expected, $this->repository->createBooking('timeslot-uuid', $body));
    }

    public function testExtendPrebookPostsToExtendEndpointWithoutBody(): void
    {
        $expected = ['uuid' => 'booking-1'];

        $response = $this->createMock(ApiResponseInterface::class);
        $response->method('getData')->willReturn($expected);

        $this->apiClient
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('call')
            ->with(
                'POST',
                '/client/booking/prebook/extend/booking-1',
                []
            )
            ->willReturn($response);

        $this->assertSame($expected, $this->repository->extendPrebook('booking-1'));
    }

    public function testConfirmPrebookPostsJsonToConfirmEndpoint(): void
    {
        $body     = ['bookingDetail' => ['productId' => 'P1']];
        $expected = ['uuid' => 'booking-1', 'isCanceled' => false];

        $response = $this->createMock(ApiResponseInterface::class);
        $response->method('getData')->willReturn($expected);

        $this->apiClient
            ->expects($this->once())
            ->method('call')
            ->with(
                'POST',
                '/client/booking/prebook/confirm/booking-1',
                ['json' => $body]
            )
            ->willReturn($response);

        $this->assertSame($expected, $this->repository->confirmPrebook('booking-1', $body));
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\ElibertyBookingV2\Repository;

use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ApiClient\Infra\Client\ApiClientInterface;

/**
 * Thin transport-level wrapper around the Eliberty Booking V2 REST API.
 * One method per remote endpoint, returns the raw response payload.
 */
class BookingV2Repository
{
    private ApiClientInterface $bookingV2ApiClient;

    public function __construct(ApiClientInterface $bookingV2ApiClient)
    {
        $this->bookingV2ApiClient = $bookingV2ApiClient;
    }

    /**
     * @return array<string, mixed>
     */
    public function listTimeslots(string $resourceUuid, string $dateFrom, string $dateTo): array
    {
        return $this->bookingV2ApiClient->call(
            'GET',
            sprintf('/admin/timeslot/list/%s', $resourceUuid),
            ['query' => ['dateFrom' => $dateFrom, 'dateTo' => $dateTo]]
        )->getData();
    }

    /**
     * @param array<string, mixed> $payload
     *
     * @return array<string, mixed>
     */
    public function createBooking(string $timeslotUuid, array $payload): array
    {
        return $this->bookingV2ApiClient->call(
            'POST',
            sprintf('/client/booking/%s', $timeslotUuid),
            ['json' => $payload]
        )->getData();
    }

    /**
     * @return array<string, mixed>
     */
    public function extendPrebook(string $bookingUuid): array
    {
        return $this->bookingV2ApiClient->call(
            'POST',
            sprintf('/client/booking/prebook/extend/%s', $bookingUuid),
            []
        )->getData();
    }

    /**
     * @param array<string, mixed> $payload
     *
     * @return array<string, mixed>
     */
    public function confirmPrebook(string $bookingUuid, array $payload): array
    {
        return $this->bookingV2ApiClient->call(
            'POST',
            sprintf('/client/booking/prebook/confirm/%s', $bookingUuid),
            ['json' => $payload]
        )->getData();
    }
}

<?php

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Helpers;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Eliberty\ConfigManagerBundle\Model\ConfigManager;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ProductType;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\Order;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Util\CacheUtils;
use GuzzleHttp\Exception\RequestException;
use Psr\Log\LoggerInterface;

class BaseApiHelper
{
    protected LoggerInterface $loggerBooking;
    protected EntityManagerInterface $em;
    protected ConfigManager $configManager;

    public function __construct(ConfigManager $configManager, EntityManagerInterface $em, LoggerInterface $loggerBooking)
    {
        $this->loggerBooking = $loggerBooking;
        $this->em            = $em;
        $this->configManager = $configManager;
    }

    public function parseAndLogRequestException(string $functionName, RequestException $requestException): string
    {
        $error = null === $requestException->getResponse() ? 'no response' : json_decode($requestException->getResponse()->getBody(), true);

        $this->loggerBooking->error("Error during $functionName", ['error' => $error]);

        if (\is_array($error)) {
            $error = $error['message'] ?? '';
        }

        return $error ?? '';
    }

    public function parseAndLogException(string $functionName, \Exception $e): string
    {
        $error = $e->getMessage();

        $this->loggerBooking->error("Error during $functionName", ['error' => $error]);

        return $error;
    }

    public function getRedisKey(string $key, string $path, array $params): string
    {
        $mergeParam = \array_merge(
            [
                'path' => $path,
            ],
            $params
        );

        return md5('subcontingent__'.$key.'_'.CacheUtils::computeKey($mergeParam));
    }

    public function logInfo(string $message, array $context = []): void
    {
        $this->loggerBooking->info($message, $context);
    }

    protected function getWebinstance()
    {
        return $this->em->getRepository(WebInstance::class)->getWebinstance();
    }

    protected function getBookerName(string $param, Order $order, ExternalBooking $externalBooking): ?string
    {
        $result = ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME;

        if (!$externalBooking->isDefaultName($param)) {
            $methodOrder = 'getAuthor'.ucfirst($param);
            if (\is_callable([$externalBooking, $methodOrder])) {
                $result = $externalBooking->$methodOrder();
            }
        }

        // 1 - Get Booker name with contact payer or set Default Name
        if ($externalBooking->isDefaultName($param)) {
            $methodOrder = 'get'.ucfirst($param);
            if (\is_callable([$order, $methodOrder])) {
                $result = $order->$methodOrder() ?? ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME;
            }
        }

        // 2 - Get Booker Name with datacustom
        if (ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME === $result && $externalBooking->isDefaultName($param)) {
            $result = $order->getDatumcustom($param) ?? ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME;
        }

        // 3 - Get Booker Name with first participant
        if (ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME === $result && $externalBooking->isDefaultName($param)) {
            $items = $order->getItemsByType(ProductType::$typesWithValidity);

            if ($items->count() > 0) {
                $firstTicket = $items->first();

                $method = 'get'.ucfirst($param);
                if (\is_callable([$firstTicket, $method])) {
                    $result = $firstTicket->$method() ?? ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME;
                }
            }
        }

        return $result;
    }

    protected function getBookerPhone(Order $order, ExternalBooking $externalBooking): ?string
    {
        $phone = $order->getPhone();

        if (null === $externalBooking->getAuthorPhone() && null !== $order->getDatumcustom('mobile')) {
            $phone = $order->getDatumcustom('mobile');
        }

        // Replace booker phone number with mobile if mobile was set
        if (null !== $order->getMobile()) {
            $phone = $order->getMobile();
        }

        return $phone;
    }

    public function getCacheExpirationTime(): int
    {
        return $this->configManager->getIntOption('booking.cache_expiration_time', 300);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ElibertyBooking\Rest;

use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Eliberty\ConfigManagerBundle\Model\ConfigManager;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\ExternalBooking;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Season;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingProvider;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Enum\ExternalBookingState;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Helpers\BaseApiHelper;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models\SubContingentData;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\Order;
use Eliberty\Utils\StringUtils;
use Monolog\Logger;

/**
 * Class ApiHelper.
 */
class ApiHelper extends BaseApiHelper
{
    public const BOOKING_ORDERSTATE_INIT      = 'init';
    public const BOOKING_ORDERSTATE_CART      = 'cart';
    public const BOOKING_ORDERSTATE_CONFIRMED = 'confirmed';
    public const BOOKING_TYPE_PUBLIC          = 'public';

    public function __construct(ConfigManager $configManager, EntityManagerInterface $em, Logger $loggerBooking)
    {
        parent::__construct($configManager, $em, $loggerBooking);
    }

    public function getListOfDays(array $bookingDays): array
    {
        $days = [];

        if (0 !== \count($bookingDays) && !\array_key_exists('error', $bookingDays)) {
            foreach ($bookingDays as $bookingDay) {
                if (!\in_array($bookingDay['date'], $days)) {
                    $days[] = $bookingDay['date'];
                }
            }
        }

        return $days;
    }

    /**
     * @param array $bookingActivites
     *
     * @return ArrayCollection<SubContingent>
     *
     * @throws \Exception
     */
    public function getSubContingents(array $bookingActivites): ArrayCollection
    {
        $list = new ArrayCollection();

        foreach ($bookingActivites as $bookingActivity) {
            $subContingent = $this->serializeSubContingentResponse($bookingActivity);
            $list->add($subContingent);
        }

        return $list;
    }

    /**
     * @param array $response
     *
     * @return SubContingent
     *
     * @throws \Exception
     */
    public function serializeSubContingentResponse(array $response): SubContingent
    {
        $webinstance = $this->getWebinstance();

        $subContingent = $this->em->getRepository(SubContingent::class)->findOneBy([
            'externalId'  => $response['id'],
            'webinstance' => $webinstance,
        ]);

        // Create object SubContingent if $subContingent not exists or update it if exists
        if (null === $subContingent) {
            $subContingent = new SubContingent();
        }

        $subContingent->setLabel($response['label'])
                ->setDailyBooking($response['dailyBooking'])
                ->setDate(new \DateTime($response['date']))
                ->setExternalId($response['id'])
                ->setLabel($response['label'])
                ->setQuotaAvailable($response['quotaAvailablePublic'] - $response['quotaInUsePublic'])
                ->setQuotaInUse($response['quotaInUsePublic'])
                ->setType(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING)
                ->setLimitQuotaOrderVel($response['limitQuotaOrderPublicVel'])
                ->setSalesClosedAt(new \DateTime($response['closedAt']))
                ->setPosition($response['position']);

        if (isset($response['isQuotaUnlimitedForPublic'])) {
            $subContingent->setQuotaUnlimited((bool) $response['isQuotaUnlimitedForPublic']);
        }

        if (isset($response['quotaUnlimitedForPublic'])) {
            $subContingent->setQuotaUnlimited((bool) $response['quotaUnlimitedForPublic']);
        }

        $subContingent->setWebinstance($webinstance);

        return $subContingent;
    }

    /**
     * @param array                $response
     * @param SubContingent|null   $subContingent
     * @param ExternalBooking|null $externalBooking
     *
     * @return ExternalBooking
     *
     * @throws \Exception
     */
    public function serializeExternalBookingResponse(array $response, SubContingent $subContingent = null, ExternalBooking $externalBooking = null): ExternalBooking
    {
        // Create object ExternalBooking if $externalBooking not exists or update it if exists
        if (null === $externalBooking) {
            $externalBooking = new ExternalBooking();

            if (null !== $subContingent) {
                $externalBooking->setSubContingent($subContingent);
            }
        }

        $status = 'init'      === $response['orderState'] ? ExternalBookingState::INIT : null;
        $status = 'cart'      === $response['orderState'] ? ExternalBookingState::CART : $status;
        $status = 'confirmed' === $response['orderState'] ? ExternalBookingState::CONFIRMED : $status;
        $status = 'cancelled' === $response['orderState'] ? ExternalBookingState::CANCELLED : $status;

        $externalBooking->setExternalId($response['id'] ?? $externalBooking->getExternalId())
                ->setType(ExternalBookingProvider::ELIBERTY_BOOKING)
                ->setExternalReference($response['bookingReference'])
                ->setLabel($response['unit']['resource']['label'])
                ->setStatus($status)
                ->setCount($response['count'])
                ->setWebinstance($this->getWebinstance())
                ->setAuthorLocale('fr_FR' === $response['bookerLocale'] ? 'fr' : 'en')
                ->setAuthorFirstname($response['bookerFirstname'])
                ->setAuthorLastname($response['bookerLastname'])
                ->setAuthorMail($response['bookerMail'])
                ->setAuthorPhone($response['bookerPhone']);

        $subContingent = $this->serializeSubContingentResponse($response['unit']);
        $externalBooking->setSubContingent($subContingent);

        return $externalBooking;
    }

    public function getParamDaysAvailability(): array
    {
        $currentSeason   = $this->em->getRepository(Season::class)->getCurrentSeason();
        $seasonStartDate = $currentSeason->getStartDate();
        $seasonEndDate   = $currentSeason->getEndDate();

        return [
            'perpage'    => $this->configManager->getIntOption('booking.perpage_result'),
            'page'       => 1,
            'startdate'  => $seasonStartDate->format('Y-m-d\TH:i:s'),
            'enddate'    => $seasonEndDate->format('Y-m-d\TH:i:s'),
            'bookertype' => 'public',
        ];
    }

    public function getParamActivitiesBetweenDates(?\DateTime $startDate, ?\DateTime $endDate): array
    {
        $perpage = $this->configManager->getIntOption('booking.perpage_result');

        $params = [
            'perpage'    => $perpage,
            'page'       => 1,
            'bookertype' => 'public',
        ];

        if (null !== $startDate) {
            $params['startdate'] = $startDate->format('Y-m-d\TH:i:s');
        }

        if (null !== $endDate) {
            $params['enddate'] = $endDate->format('Y-m-d\TH:i:s');
        }

        return $params;
    }

    public function getParamCreateBooking(Order $order, SubContingentData $subContingentData): array
    {
        return [
            'order' => [
                'externalReference' => StringUtils::genUuid(),
                'bookingType'       => self::BOOKING_TYPE_PUBLIC,
                'unit'              => $subContingentData->getSubContingentId(),
                'count'             => $subContingentData->getQty(),
                'bookerLocale'      => str_replace('fr', 'fr_FR', $order->getLocale()),
                'bookerFirstname'   => ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME,
                'bookerLastname'    => ExternalBooking::DEFAULT_NAME,
                'orderState'        => self::BOOKING_ORDERSTATE_INIT,
            ],
        ];
    }

    public function getParamSynchronizeBooking(Order $order, ExternalBooking $externalBooking): array
    {
        $orderState   = ($order->isConfirmed() ? self::BOOKING_ORDERSTATE_CONFIRMED : self::BOOKING_ORDERSTATE_CART);
        $items        = $order->getItemsWithExternalBookings();
        $bookingItems = [];

        foreach ($items as $item) {
            if ($item->getDatum('externalBookingId') === $externalBooking->getExternalId()) {
                $bookingItems[] = [
                    'cardNumber' => $item->getCardNumber(),
                    'lastname'   => $item->getLastname(),
                    'firstname'  => $item->getFirstname(),
                    'birthdate'  => null !== $item->getBirthdate() ? $item->getBirthdate()->format('Y-m-d\TH:i:s') : null,
                    'personType' => $item->getConscatShortName(),
                ];
            }
        }

        return [
            'order' => [
                'externalReference' => $order->getId(),
                'count'             => \count($bookingItems),
                'bookerLocale'      => 'fr' === $order->getLocale() ? 'fr_FR' : $order->getLocale(),
                'bookerFirstname'   => $this->getBookerName('firstname', $order, $externalBooking),
                'bookerLastname'    => $this->getBookerName('lastname', $order, $externalBooking),
                'bookerPhone'       => $this->getBookerPhone($order, $externalBooking),
                'orderState'        => $orderState,
                'bookerMail'        => $order->getEmail(),
                'orderItems'        => $bookingItems,
                'totalPrice'        => $order->getTotal(),
            ],
        ];
    }

    public function getParamConfirmBooking(Order $order): array
    {
        return [
            'order' => [
                'orderState'   => self::BOOKING_ORDERSTATE_CONFIRMED,
                'bookerMail'   => $order->getEmail(),
                'totalPrice'   => $order->getTotal(),
                'bookerLocale' => 'fr' === $order->getLocale() ? 'fr_FR' : $order->getLocale(),
            ],
        ];
    }
}

<?php

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models;

use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Orderitem;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Product;

class SubContingentData
{
    protected int $qty = 0;
    protected Product $product;
    protected Collection $orderItems;
    protected String $subContingentId;
    protected ?String $externalBookingId = null;
    protected \DateTime $date;

    /**
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDate(): \DateTime
    {
        return $this->date;
    }

    /**
     * @param \DateTime $date
     *
     * @return SubContingentData
     */
    public function setDate(\DateTime $date): self
    {
        $this->date = $date;

        return $this;
    }

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->orderItems = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    public function getExternalBookingId(): ?string
    {
        return $this->externalBookingId;
    }

    public function setExternalBookingId(?string $externalBookingId): self
    {
        $this->externalBookingId = $externalBookingId;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getSubContingentId(): string
    {
        return $this->subContingentId;
    }

    public function setSubContingentId(string $subContingentId): self
    {
        $this->subContingentId = $subContingentId;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getQty(): int
    {
        return $this->qty;
    }

    public function setQty(int $qty): self
    {
        $this->qty = $qty;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getProduct(): Product
    {
        return $this->product;
    }

    public function setProduct(Product $product): self
    {
        $this->product = $product;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getOrderItems(): Collection
    {
        return $this->orderItems;
    }

    public function setOrderItems(Collection $orderItems): self
    {
        $this->orderItems = $orderItems;

        return $this;
    }

    public function addOrderItem(Orderitem $item): self
    {
        $this->orderItems->add($item);

        return $this;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Models;

use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\SubContingent;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\Traits\TimeStampableBehavior;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\WebInstance;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Model\WebinstanceFilterable;

/**
 * Class ExternalBooking.
 */
class ExternalBooking implements WebinstanceFilterable
{
    /*
     * Hook timestampable and blameable behaviors
     * updates createdAt, updatedAt
     */
    use TimeStampableBehavior;

    public const DEFAULT_NAME = 'web';

    protected string $externalId            = '';
    protected ?string $type                 = null;
    protected ?string $externalReference    = '';
    protected ?string $label                = '';
    protected ?SubContingent $subContingent = null;
    protected ?int $count                   = 0;
    protected ?string $status               = null;
    protected ?string $authorFirstname      = self::DEFAULT_NAME;
    protected ?string $authorLastname       = self::DEFAULT_NAME;
    protected ?string $authorPhone          = '';
    protected ?string $authorMail           = '';
    protected ?string $authorLocale         = '';
    protected ?WebInstance $webinstance     = null;

    public function getAuthorFirstname(): ?string
    {
        return $this->authorFirstname;
    }

    public function setAuthorFirstname(?string $authorFirstname): self
    {
        $this->authorFirstname = $authorFirstname;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getAuthorLastname(): ?string
    {
        return $this->authorLastname;
    }

    {
        $this->authorLastname = $authorLastname;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getAuthorPhone(): ?string
    {
        return $this->authorPhone;
    }

    public function setAuthorPhone(?string $authorPhone): self
    {
        $this->authorPhone = $authorPhone;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getAuthorMail(): ?string
    {
        return $this->authorMail;
    }

    public function setAuthorMail(?string $authorMail): self
    {
        $this->authorMail = $authorMail;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getAuthorLocale(): ?string
    {
        return $this->authorLocale;
    }

    public function setAuthorLocale(?string $authorLocale): self
    {
        $this->authorLocale = $authorLocale;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getExternalReference(): ?string
    {
        return $this->externalReference;
    }

    public function setExternalReference(?string $externalReference): self
    {
        $this->externalReference = $externalReference;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getLabel(): ?string
    {
        return $this->label;
    }

    public function setLabel(?string $label): self
    {
        $this->label = $label;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getSubContingent(): ?SubContingent
    {
        return $this->subContingent;
    }

    public function setSubContingent(?SubContingent $subContingent): self
    {
        $this->subContingent = $subContingent;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getCount(): int
    {

        $this->count = $count;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getStatus(): ?string
    {
        return $this->status;
    }

    public function setStatus(string $status = null): self
    {
        $this->status = $status;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getType(): ?string
    {
        return $this->type;
    }

    public function setType(string $type = null): self
    {
        $this->type = $type;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getExternalId(): string
    {
        return $this->externalId;
    }

    public function setExternalId(string $externalId): self
    {
        $this->externalId = $externalId;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getWebinstance(): ?WebInstance
    {
        return $this->webinstance;
    }

    public function setWebinstance(?WebInstance $webinstance): self
    {
        $this->webinstance = $webinstance;

        return $this;
    }

    public function isDefaultName(string $param): bool
    {
        $whitelistParam = ['lastname', 'firstname'];
        $methodBooking  = 'getAuthor'.ucfirst($param);

        if (
            \in_array($param, $whitelistParam) && \is_callable([$this, $methodBooking]) && self::DEFAULT_NAME === $this->$methodBooking()
        ) {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types = 1);

namespace Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\Traits;

use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Product;
use Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Entity\Season;

trait getDaysAvailabilityTrait
{
    /**
     * @throws \DateMalformedPeriodStringException
     */
    public function getDaysAvailability(Product $product): array
    {
        /** @var Season $currentSeason */
        $currentSeason = $this->em->getRepository(Season::class)->getCurrentSeason();
        $seasonEndDate = $currentSeason->getEndDate();

        $startDate = (new \DateTime())->setTime(0, 0);

        $endDateInclusive = (clone $seasonEndDate)
            ->setTime(0, 0)
            ->add(new \DateInterval('P1D'));

        $interval = new \DateInterval('P1D');

        $dateRange = new \DatePeriod($startDate, $interval, $endDateInclusive);

        $result = [];
        /** @var \DateTimeInterface $date */
        foreach ($dateRange as $date) {
            $result[] = $date->format('Y-m-d');
        }

        return $result;
    }
}

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user (a senior PHP developer working on the Redpill Symfony 3.4 monolith) requested implementation of a new booking provider `ElibertyBookingV2` that connects to a new REST API replacing the legacy Eliberty booking backend. The provider must:
   - Implement the existing `Eliberty\RedpillBundle\ExternalActivity\ExternalActivityHandlerInterface`
   - Connect to two distinct hosts: super-admin backend (`https://superadmin-backend.skiwise.com`) for `POST /login` only, and booking module (`https://booking-module.skiwise.com`) for all other endpoints
   - Use the existing `src/RedpillBundle/ApiClient` infrastructure (NOT raw Guzzle)
   - Authenticate with JWT obtained from `/login`, used as Bearer on both hosts
   - Send `x-tenant-slag` header (read from ConfigManager `booking.v2.tenant-slag`) on every booking-module call
   - Be PHP 7.4 compatible, pass phpcs and phpstan level 1, ship with PHPUnit unit tests
   - Map interface methods: `getDaysAvailability`/`getSubContingents*` → `GET /admin/timeslot/list/{resourceUuid}`, `createBooking` → `POST /client/booking/{timeslotUUid}`, `synchronizeBooking` → `/client/booking/prebook/extend/{bookingUuid}` (extend-only), `confirmBooking` → `/client/booking/prebook/confirm/{bookingUuid}`
   - The user explicitly said: don't change existing providers, follow established patterns, ask questions before taking architecture decisions, and use TDD

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Symfony 3.4 multi-tenant monolith (RedPill)
   - PHP 7.4 with PHPUnit 9.6
   - `ExternalActivityHandlerInterface` with auto-tagging via `GenericTagCompilerPass`
   - `ExternalActivityHandlerFactory` with class-name-based resolution (`'eliberty_booking_v2'` → `ElibertyBookingV2\Rest\ElibertyBookingV2Handler`)
   - `src/RedpillBundle/ApiClient` infrastructure: `AuthJwtApiClient`, `ParameterizedClientFactory`, `RedisApiToken`, `JwtToken`, `StatusCodeTokenError`, `ApiConfigParameters`
   - Decorator pattern over `ApiClientInterface` for header injection
   - Repository pattern (one method per remote endpoint, like `Trinity\Resources\BaseTrinityApiClient`)
   - `BaseApiHelper` with booker fallback chain (`getBookerName`, `getBookerPhone`)
   - `ConfigManager::getStringOption()`, `getIntOption()`, `getJsonOption()`, `getByNamespace()`
   - PHPUnit MockObject pattern with `createMock(ApiClientInterface::class)`
   - Test runner: `vendor/symfony/phpunit-bridge/bin/simple-phpunit`
   - Red-Green-Refactor TDD discipline

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`/home/xav/.claude/plans/woolly-wobbling-cookie.md`** (final approved plan)
     - The implementation blueprint: lists files to create, configuration keys, component design, build sequence, verification
     - Locked decisions: single JWT for both APIs, extend-only sync, BaseApiHelper booker fallback for create payload, no refactor of existing providers

     ```php
     // appended to $values array
     ```

     - Decorator that injects `x-tenant-slag` header before delegating to `AuthJwtApiClient`
     ```php
     final class ElibertyBookingV2ApiClient implements ApiClientInterface
     {
         public const TENANT_SLAG_CONFIG_KEY = 'booking.v2.tenant-slag';
         public const TENANT_SLAG_HEADER     = 'x-tenant-slag';

         private ApiClientInterface $authClient;
         private ConfigManager $configManager;

         public function __construct(ApiClientInterface $authClient, ConfigManager $configManager)
         {
             $this->authClient    = $authClient;
             $this->configManager = $configManager;
         }

         public function call(string $method, string $uri = '', array $options = []): ApiResponseInterface
         {
             $tenantSlag = (string) $this->configManager->getStringOption(self::TENANT_SLAG_CONFIG_KEY);
             $options['headers'] = $options['headers'] ?? [];
             $options['headers'][self::TENANT_SLAG_HEADER] = $tenantSlag;
             return $this->authClient->call($method, $uri, $options);
         }
     }
     ```

   - **`/home/xav/Workspace/Rpstack/redpill/tests/Unit/Eliberty/RedpillBundle/ApiClient/ElibertyBookingV2/Client/ElibertyBookingV2ApiClientTest.php`** (created)

     - Thin transport wrapper, 4 methods

     ```php
     class BookingV2Repository

             $this->bookingV2ApiClient = $bookingV2ApiClient;

         public function listTimeslots(string $resourceUuid, string $dateFrom, string $dateTo): array

             return $this->bookingV2ApiClient->call('GET',

                 ['query' => ['dateFrom' => $dateFrom, 'dateTo' => $dateTo]]
             )->getData();
         }

         public function createBooking(string $timeslotUuid, array $payload): array
         {
             return $this->bookingV2ApiClient->call('POST',
                 sprintf('/client/booking/%s', $timeslotUuid),
                 ['json' => $payload]
             )->getData();
         }

         public function extendPrebook(string $bookingUuid): array

             return $this->bookingV2ApiClient->call('POST',
                 sprintf('/client/booking/prebook/extend/%s', $bookingUuid),

             )->getData();
         }

         public function confirmPrebook(string $bookingUuid, array $payload): array
         {
             return $this->bookingV2ApiClient->call('POST',
                 sprintf('/client/booking/prebook/confirm/%s', $bookingUuid),
                 ['json' => $payload]
             )->getData();
         }
     }
     ```

   I had finalized the ApiHelper API design (in my analysis):
   - `extractAvailableDates(array $timeslots): array<string>` - distinct startDate from /admin/timeslot/list response
   - `hydrateSubContingentFromTimeslot(SubContingent $sub, array $timeslot, WebInstance $wi): SubContingent` - pure hydration
   - `hydrateExternalBookingFromResponse(ExternalBooking $eb, array $response, ?SubContingent $sub): ExternalBooking` - pure hydration
   - `buildCreateBookingPayload(Order $order, SubContingentData $data, ExternalBooking $eb): array`
   - `buildConfirmBookingPayload(Order $order, ExternalBooking $eb): array`
   - `getAvailabilityDateRange(): array{from: string, to: string}` - uses Season repo via $em
   
   Key design insight: ApiHelper does NO database writes — it only does pure mapping/hydration. The handler will perform find-or-create operations and pass entities to ApiHelper for hydration. This makes ApiHelper trivially testable.
